title: ricinocarpus angolensis
intro: Ricinocarpus angolensis, also known as the Angola ricinocarpus or the elephant's tooth, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus angolensis include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. The plant is prepared in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
